name: Reverse Shell Containment
description: Isolates endpoints showing shell spawn events from web servers.
steps: Isolate the endpoint from the network.

name: Credential Dumping Response
description: Responds to suspected LSASS or registry credential access attempts.

name: Malware Execution Response
description: Contains identified malicious execution threats.
steps: Verify file hash on threat feeds.

name: Ransomware Containment
description: Halts active encryption processes on hosts.
steps: Suspend high CPU file IO processes.

name: Persistence Removal
description: Cleans autostart, runkeys, or malicious tasks.

name: Suspicious PowerShell Activity
description: Tackles obfuscated or command-line encoded PowerShell executions.

name: Bruteforce Protection
description: Locks out account after consecutive failed login spikes.

name: Privilege Escalation Response
description: Mitigates unauthorized user escalation to administrator.

name: Suspicious Account Creation
description: Investigates newly created accounts with high privilege mappings.

name: MFA Bypass Investigation
description: Investigates consecutive sessions bypassing authentication requirements.

name: Password Spray Response
description: Defends active directories against password spray attacks.

name: Port Scan Response
description: Blocks IPs performing reconnaissance sweep scanning.
steps: Block source IP at gateway firewall.
Monitor firewall alerts for rebound sweep.

name: Lateral Movement Containment
description: Contain host-to-host movement inside network boundaries.

name: Beaconing Detection Response
description: Defends against C2 periodic beaconing channels.

name: Command and Control Response
description: Tackles command & control channel connections.

name: Data Exfiltration Response
description: Halts massive data transfers out of the perimeter.

name: SQL Injection Response
description: Mitigates SQL Injection attempts on backend APIs.
steps: Block attacker IP on Application Firewall.

name: XSS Response
description: Responds to injected cross site scripting code payloads.

name: SSRF Response
description: Tackles Server Side Request Forgery threats.

name: API Abuse Response
description: Restricts bots or scraping APIs sessions.

name: Cloud Access Key Abuse
description: Mitigates leaks or usage of static cloud credentials.

name: Public Cloud Exposure
description: Restricts public exposure settings on VM or subnet.

name: Misconfigured Storage Bucket
description: Secures publicly exposed storage containers.

name: Suspicious Cloud Privilege Assignment
description: Tackles unauthorized role bindings in cloud accounts.

name: Compliance Security Finding
description: Registers standard security violations into incident records.
